registration_rule: Every expedition exists because a canonical artifact demands a transformation. Expeditions are registered, not started. Implementation capabilities (codegen, scaffold, install, migrate, compile) exist only inside expeditions, never in initialization.
ordering_authority: TASKPRO-BUILD-001 feature dependency graph (Foundation -> Auth -> Profile/Discovery -> Services -> Booking -> Tasks -> Messaging/Reviews -> Notifications)

expeditions.name: Foundation & toolchain
expeditions.transformation: TurboRepo monorepo skeleton: apps/ and packages/ layout, strict TypeScript config, ESLint/Prettier/Husky, CI scaffold.
expedition_local_decisions: Tool version selection for Vitest, React Native Testing Library, Detox, and Storybook is an implementation concern inside this expedition. It is no longer represented as governance decision D3 and does not block E1.
expeditions.completion_evidence: BUILD-001 Phase 0 completion criteria subset: project builds, lints, typechecks, tests run.

expeditions.name: Design tokens & theme (packages/design-tokens)
expeditions.transformation: Token hierarchy (global/alias/semantic/component) and theme system (light/dark/high-contrast, semantic remapping) as a compilable package.

expeditions.name: UI component library (packages/ui) + Storybook
expeditions.transformation: Foundation/navigation/form/service/marketplace/workflow/communication/payment/professional/AI components with variants, states, interaction and motion rules; Storybook visual harness.

expeditions.name: Domain, types & contracts (packages/domain, packages/types, supabase/)
expeditions.transformation: Backend-independent domain layer (aggregates, value objects, domain events), shared contracts, canonical database schema with RLS. Domain package contains no Supabase dependency (MOD-001 purity rule).

expeditions.name: Application shell (apps/mobile route groups, providers, auth session)
expeditions.transformation: Expo Router structure with (auth)/(customer)/(technician)/(shared) route groups, root providers, session restoration, role-based routing, deep links.
expeditions.completion_evidence: BUILD-001 Phase 0 completion: app launches, navigates, renders themed components, executes tests.

expeditions.name: Identity & discovery vertical slice (BUILD-001 Phase 1)
expeditions.transformation: Registration, login, session handling, profile setup, home dashboard, service search/categories/listings/detail — first usable capability: register -> login -> browse services.

expeditions.name: Booking & task lifecycle (BUILD-001 Phase 2)
expeditions.transformation: Booking request, scheduling, confirmation, task timeline, status updates, completion flow, payment capture — a complete service transaction.
expeditions.completion_evidence: Booking lifecycle use cases, in-memory repository, customer/technician screens, route groups, and domain tests pass.

expeditions.name: Communication layer (BUILD-001 Phase 3)
expeditions.transformation: Conversations, messages, attachments, push notifications, unread indicators.
expeditions.completion_evidence: Conversation and notification aggregates, repositories, use cases, mobile screens, routes, and UI components implemented and tested.

expeditions.name: Marketplace expansion (BUILD-001 Phase 4)
expeditions.transformation: Listings, seller profiles, transactions, payment integration hardening.
expeditions.completion_evidence: Payment and payout aggregates, in-memory repositories, mobile marketplace and payment screens, routes, and UI components implemented and tested.

expeditions.name: Trust & platform maturity (BUILD-001 Phase 5)
expeditions.transformation: Provider verification, reputation, analytics, monitoring, production readiness.
expeditions.completion_evidence: Review and verification aggregates, in-memory repositories, mobile trust screens, analytics dashboard, adapter ports, and production-readiness CI scaffolding implemented and tested.

expeditions.name: Environment & Configuration (BUILD-002 W11)
expeditions.transformation: Centralized mobile configuration system with environment-specific values, feature flags, and runtime validation.
expeditions.completion_evidence: apps/mobile/src/config/* implements Environment, Config, FeatureFlags with tests; .env.example updated; no process.env leakage outside config layer.

expeditions.name: Build Profiles & Local Artifacts (BUILD-002 W12)
expeditions.transformation: EAS build profiles and package scripts for development, local APK, staging APK, and production AAB artifacts.
expeditions.completion_evidence: apps/mobile/eas.json defines development/preview/staging/production profiles; root and mobile package.json expose mobile:dev, mobile:build:local/staging/production scripts; eas-cli installed.

expeditions.name: GitHub Actions CI (BUILD-002 W13)
expeditions.transformation: CI workflows for validation, local APK artifact creation, and staging APK artifact creation.
expeditions.completion_evidence: .github/workflows/ci.yml refactored with artifact upload; build-local.yml and build-staging.yml added; YAML syntax validated; lint/typecheck/test/format pass.

expeditions.name: Google Play Internal Testing (BUILD-002 W14)
gates: Play Console app with package name configured
Google Service Account key with Play Internal Testing upload permission
expeditions.transformation: Automated upload of staging builds to the Google Play Internal Testing track via EAS Submit.

expeditions.name: Staging Environment (BUILD-002 W15)
gates: Staging app icon and branding assets
expeditions.transformation: Dedicated staging backend and branded TaskPRO Staging application.

expeditions.name: Production Releases (BUILD-002 W16)
expeditions.transformation: Tagged production releases with signed AAB and Play Store Production track deployment.

expeditions.name: OTA Updates (BUILD-002 W17)
expeditions.transformation: EAS Update channels for non-native changes without store submissions.

expeditions.name: Observability (BUILD-002 W18)
expeditions.transformation: Replace console analytics and crash reporting placeholders with PostHog and Sentry.

expeditions.name: End-to-End Testing (BUILD-002 W19)
gates: Device or simulator runtime available in CI
expeditions.transformation: Maestro E2E flows integrated into CI.

expeditions.name: Release Automation (BUILD-002 W20)
expeditions.transformation: Automated versioning, changelogs, release notes, and artifact retention.
